_description: Shared Layer-1 (WalletCore/WASM, packages/core) / Layer-2 (RN-JS, packages/sdk) golden vector for a Solana SystemProgram transfer. Read via a plain readFileSync (not an import) by packages/core/mpc/tx/compile/compileTx.golden.test.ts AND packages/sdk/tests/unit/platforms/react-native/tx-builder-golden-vectors.test.ts, since packages/sdk does not depend on packages/core and a file read sidesteps the workspace dependency graph entirely. This is the SINGLE source of truth for this fixture - do not duplicate these values as literals in either test file.
_derivedNote: senderAddress below is deterministically derived from senderPrivateKeyHex via WalletCore.AnyAddress.createWithPublicKey (ed25519). packages/core's suite re-derives it fresh via its own already-loaded WalletCore/WASM instance (proving live agreement every run); packages/sdk's unit suite reads it directly here instead, to avoid adding a WASM wallet-core dependency to an otherwise pure-JS/fast unit test file. Anyone can independently re-verify this field from the private key above.
